issues.sample: THIS HAS HAPPENED SINCE I BOUGHT THE CAR NEW.  AFTER FILLING THE VEHICLE, A VERY STRONG GAS ODOR EMITS FROM THAT GAS TANK NEAR THE GAS CAP.  AFTER PARKING IN THE GARAGE OVERNIGHT, THE ENTIRE GARAGE HAS A VERY STRONG ODOR AND IT EVEN LEAKS INTO THE HOUSE.  DEALERSHIP HAS INSPECTED

BOTH BLIND SPOT MONITORING AND CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT - MALFUNCTION ALERTS, KEEPS POPPING UP REGULARLY.  MULTIPLE TRIPS TO THE DEALER, WITH NO RESOLUTION.  TOYOTA INDICATES THAT THIS IS A PROB AND ARE WORKING ON AN SOLUTION.  IT IS NOT CLEAR WHAT THAT IS.  SEEMS LIKE ISSUE POPS UP M

THESE ISSUES OCCUR CONSISTENTLY WHILE DRIVING ON A LOCAL SIDE STREETS AT LOW SPEEDS, BETWEEN 0-35 MPH.  (1) WHEN EXECUTING A STOP AND GO EITHER AT A STOP LIGHT OR A STOP SIGN, MY 2019 AVALON XLE EMITS A "JERKING" MOTION BEFORE IT DECIDES TO KICK INTO GEAR.  THE "JERKING" CAN EASI

TOYOTA AVALON HYBRID WITH KEYLESS IGNITION.  CAR IS SILENT BUT MAY STAY ON WHEN PARKED IN GARAGE.  THERE IS NO WARNING SOUND OR LIGHT IF CAR IS LEFT ON AND CAR IS SILENT, BUT AS BATTERY DRAINS, THE ENGINE MAY COME ON 20 MIN LATER AND GENERATE CARBON MONOXIDE. I AM AN ALERT DRIVER

narrative.headline: What 2019 Toyota Avalon owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 65 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (26% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
